title: EU Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism enters transitional phase
summary: CBAM reporting obligations are now active for importers of steel, cement, aluminium, fertilizers, electricity and hydrogen into the EU.

title: India's carbon credit market framework — CCTS update
summary: The Carbon Credit Trading Scheme (CCTS) rules have been notified. Obligated entities under PAT scheme are the first cohort.

title: Voluntary carbon market hits $2B in 2026 Q1 transactions
summary: Nature-based solutions and renewable energy credits dominate trading volumes as corporates accelerate net-zero commitments.

title: SEBI tightens BRSR Core disclosure requirements for top 500 listed entities
summary: Reasonable assurance on BRSR Core is now mandatory for top 150 companies by market cap for FY 2025-26.

title: ISO 14068-1 Carbon Neutrality standard — adoption update
summary: ISO 14068-1:2023 is gaining traction as the preferred framework for carbon neutrality claims, complementing ISO 14064 series.
